text:
Phase 1: Trading Directives is complete. All 361 unit tests pass (including 28 new directive tests).

**Files created:**
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/core/directive.py` - DirectionBias enum, TradingDirective dataclass, DirectiveRegistry class, parse_bias_arg helper
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/tests/unit/test_directive.py` - 28 comprehensive tests

**Files modified:**
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/execution/execution_engine.py` - Added `directive_registry` parameter, bias filtering before order limit check, max_allocation cap on target_value
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/strategy/base.py` - Added `_directives` attribute and `directives` property
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/config/paper.yaml` - Added directives section
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/config/live.yaml` - Added directives section
summary: Phase 1 Trading Directives complete, all tests pass

text:
Phase 3: Hardware Acceleration is complete. All tests pass.

## Summary of changes

### New files created:
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/compute/__init__.py` - Package init
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/compute/backend.py` - Backend detection (CuPy > Numba > NumPy)
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/compute/gpu.py` - CuPy GPU kernels for all indicators + metrics
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/compute/cpu.py` - Numba JIT-compiled CPU kernels with plain Python fallback
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/compute/parallel.py` - Multi-process parallel backtesting via ProcessPoolExecutor
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/tests/unit/test_compute_backend.py` - Backend detection tests (4 tests)
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/tests/unit/test_compute_cpu.py` - CPU kernel tests (6 tests)
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/tests/unit/test_compute_gpu.py` - GPU kernel tests (6 tests, skip when no GPU)

### Modified files:
- `src/vquant/strategy/indicators/sma.py` - Added CuPy dispatch in calculate()
- `src/vquant/strategy/indicators/ema.py` - Added CuPy + Numba dispatch in calculate()
- `src/vquant/strategy/indicators/rsi.py` - Added CuPy + Numba dispatch in calculate()
- `src/vquant/strategy/indicators/atr.py` - Added CuPy + Numba dispatch in calculate()
- `src/vquant/strategy/indicators/bollinger.py` - Added CuPy + Numba dispatch in calculate()
- `src/vquant/backtest/metrics.py` - Vectorized Sharpe/Sortino with numpy, GPU dispatch
- `src/vquant/cli/backtest.py` - Added --parallel and --symbols CLI options
- `pyproject.toml` - Added gpu/accel optional deps, numba to dev, mypy overrides for cupy/numba

### Test results:
- 10 compute backend + CPU kernel tests: PASSED
- 32 existing indicator tests: PASSED (no regressions)
- 6 GPU tests: SKIPPED (no GPU available in this environment)
summary: Phase 3 Hardware Acceleration complete, all tests pass

text:
Phase 2: Paper Trading is complete. All 9 new tests pass, and all 380 existing unit tests pass (6 skipped).

## Files Modified
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/exchange/base.py` - Added optional `callback` parameter to `subscribe_bars()` and `subscribe_trades()` abstract methods
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/exchange/simulated_adapter.py` - Updated signatures to match base class
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/exchange/alpaca_adapter.py` - Updated signatures to match base class
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/core/engine.py` - Paper mode skips equity preflight check; `run_live()` now subscribes to market data feeds
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/config/settings.py` - Added `bar_size: str = "1m"` field to `AppSettings`
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/cli/paper.py` - Complete rewrite with PaperTradingAdapter, RiskEngine, directives, dashboard support
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/config/paper.yaml` - Updated with exchange, risk, and bar_size config

## Files Created
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/exchange/paper_adapter.py` - PaperTradingAdapter (real data + simulated execution hybrid)
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/src/vquant/monitoring/dashboard.py` - Rich live dashboard for paper trading
- `/mnt/d/project/vquant/tests/unit/test_paper_adapter.py` - 9 tests covering delegation, callback wrapping, cache/event publishing
summary: Phase 2 Paper Trading complete, all tests pass
